text:
Ohayou is the first opening theme of the Hunter × Hunter 1999 anime adaptation and was sung by Keno.

Characters in Order of Appearance

Gon Freecss
Kurapika
Killua Zoldyck
Leorio Paradinight

Lyrics

Video

TV version

 
Hunter X Hunter - Opening 1 (Keno-Ohayo)
